note: Keys on the exact German ORTTEXT string from the SGBD FORTTEXTE table; variant-agnostic.

faults.BC ZHL - Check-Control-Lampe im Kombi: OBC ZHL - Check Control lamp in instrument cluster
faults.Horn ausgang - Alarmhorn (Relaisbox/DWA): Horn output - alarm horn (relay box/anti-theft alarm)
faults.BC CLC - Clock-Leitung zum Check-Modul: OBC CLC - clock line to Check module
faults.BC LAC - Latch-Signal zum Check-Modul: OBC LAC - latch signal to Check module
faults.BC DATA - serielle Datenltg. zum Check.M: OBC DATA - serial data line to Check module
faults.Tacho A - Wegsignal vom Kombi: Speedometer A - road-speed signal from instrument cluster
faults.T KVA - Einspritzsignal von Motronic: T KVA - injection signal from Motronic
faults.kein Tanksignal vom Kombi: No fuel-level signal from instrument cluster
faults.Kurzschluss TxD-Leitung nach UBatt: Short circuit of TxD line to battery voltage
faults.kein LCD-Dimmsignal vom Kombi: No LCD dimming signal from instrument cluster
